# Pull Request

## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue. Explain the motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Performance improvement

## Checklist

Before submitting, ensure:

- [ ] My code follows the project style guidelines (PEP 8)
- [ ] I have added docstrings to new functions
- [ ] I have included type hints
- [ ] I have updated the documentation
- [ ] I have added tests (if applicable)
- [ ] All tests pass successfully
- [ ] My changes do not introduce new warnings
- [ ] I have checked for scientific accuracy
- [ ] I have properly cited any new references
- [ ] I have updated CHANGELOG.md

## Impact Assessment

### Scientific Impact

- [ ] No impact on calculated results
- [ ] Minor numerical differences (within uncertainty)
- [ ] Significant changes to results (requires re-analysis)
- [ ] New functionality only

### Code Impact

- [ ] Backward compatible
- [ ] Requires minor updates for users
- [ ] Breaking changes (document migration path)

## Documentation

- [ ] README.md updated (if needed)
- [ ] METHODOLOGY.md updated (if needed)
- [ ] Docstrings added/updated
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
